ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Public Administrator. Paul Malone for Myra Chatfield and other Heirs.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that he does not know what the Accountant is basing the reserve amount of $32,000.00 on. The Court referred to paragraph 9 and 10 of the petition that states that there are no outstanding property taxes or income taxes due. The Court approved the Petition for Final Distribution (subject to review of the order). The shares of the two Heirs that are incarcerated will be withheld until December 21, 2012 in the event the Victim's Compensation Board files a claim. Status on the Heirs shares that are being withheld and the cash reserve as to whether that amount is required or can be released was set for January 8, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
